Id1.text: Albennie Jones plays Jazz music which originated from Blues music. A fusion of Jazz is Afrobeat music.

Id2.text: Albennie Jones is a Jazz musician. Jazz comes from Blues music and the Afrobeat is a fusion genre of that music.

Id3.text: Albennie Jones plays jazz which originates from Blues music. Afrobeat music also has elements of Jazz.
